_meta.title: Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners - by Geography and Service
_meta.vintage_note: CMS Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners by Geography & Service. Underlying claims year: latest available CY (CMS releases lag 1-2 years; check landing_url for explicit year). Geographic granularity: 50 states + DC. Pricing semantics: avg_allowed_usd = Medicare allowed (fee schedule rate); avg_payment_usd = 80% Medicare share. Patient out-of-pocket = allowed × 0.20 + Part B deductible. Place of service: F = facility (hospital outpatient/ASC); O = non-facility/office (higher rate).

field_definitions.avg_allowed_usd: Avg_Mdcr_Alowd_Amt — Medicare-allowed amount (the fee schedule rate)
field_definitions.n_services: Tot_Srvcs — count of services rendered in period
field_definitions.n_beneficiaries: Tot_Benes — count of unique Medicare beneficiaries
field_definitions.mapping_confidence: high = canonical CPT/HCPCS; medium = code bundles related procedures or has multiple plausible variants; low = no Medicare-specific code, closest E/M billed

arterial-doppler.hcpcs_desc: Complete ultrasound study of arm and leg arteries
arterial-doppler.mapping_note: CPT 93923: Lower extremity arterial duplex Doppler, complete bilateral study.

bone-scan.hcpcs_desc: Nuclear medicine study of bone and/or joint whole body
bone-scan.mapping_note: CPT 78306: Bone and/or joint imaging; whole body.

carotid-ultrasound.hcpcs_desc: Ultrasound of both sides of head and neck blood flow
carotid-ultrasound.mapping_note: CPT 93880: Duplex scan of extracranial arteries; complete bilateral.

ct-angiography.hcpcs_desc: Ct scan of blood vessels of abdomen and pelvis with contrast
ct-angiography.mapping_note: CPT 74174: CT angiography abdomen + pelvis with contrast (most common Medicare CTA).

ct-colonography-virtual.hcpcs_desc: Diagnostic ct scan of large intestine without contrast
ct-colonography-virtual.mapping_note: CPT 74261: Diagnostic CT colonography without contrast. Screening code 74263 has no PFS payment data (Medicare expanded screening coverage in 2024; data lag). Diagnostic 74261 is the closest available rate.

ct-scan-abdomen-pelvis.hcpcs_desc: Ct scan of abdomen and pelvis with contrast
ct-scan-abdomen-pelvis.mapping_note: CPT 74177: CT abdomen + pelvis with contrast.

ct-scan-chest.hcpcs_desc: Ct scan of chest without contrast

ct-scan-head.hcpcs_desc: Ct scan head or brain without contrast

dexa-bone-density-scan.hcpcs_desc: Dxa bone density measurement of hip, pelvis, spine
dexa-bone-density-scan.mapping_note: CPT 77080: DEXA bone density study, axial skeleton.

echocardiogram.hcpcs_desc: Ultrasound of heart with color-depicted blood flow, rate, direction and valve function
echocardiogram.mapping_note: CPT 93306: Echocardiography, transthoracic, complete with Doppler and color flow.

fluoroscopy.hcpcs_desc: Imaging guidance for procedure, 60 minutes or less
fluoroscopy.mapping_note: CPT 76000: Fluoroscopy, separate procedure, up to 1 hour.

mammogram-diagnostic.mapping_note: CPT 77066: Diagnostic mammography, bilateral (distinct from screening 77067).

mri-brain.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of brain without contrast

mri-hip.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of leg joint without contrast
mri-hip.mapping_note: CPT 73721: MRI any joint of lower extremity without contrast — CMS bundles MRI hip and MRI knee under the same code.

mri-knee.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of leg joint without contrast
mri-knee.mapping_note: CPT 73721: MRI any joint of lower extremity without contrast — CMS bundles MRI knee and MRI hip under the same code.

mri-shoulder.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of arm joint without contrast
mri-shoulder.mapping_note: CPT 73221: MRI any joint of upper extremity without contrast.

mri-spine-cervical.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of upper spinal canal without contrast
mri-spine-cervical.mapping_note: CPT 72141: MRI cervical spine without contrast.

mri-spine-lumbar.hcpcs_desc: Mri scan of lower spinal canal without contrast
mri-spine-lumbar.mapping_note: CPT 72148: MRI lumbar spine without contrast.

nuclear-stress-test.hcpcs_desc: Nuclear medicine studies of heart muscle at rest and with stress and spect
nuclear-stress-test.mapping_note: CPT 78452: Myocardial perfusion imaging, multiple studies (rest + stress).

pet-scan.hcpcs_desc: Nuclear medicine study from skull base to mid-thigh with ct scan

ultrasound-thyroid.hcpcs_desc: Ultrasound scan of head and neck soft tissue
ultrasound-thyroid.mapping_note: CPT 76536: Ultrasound soft tissue head/neck (covers thyroid US).

venous-doppler-leg.hcpcs_desc: Ultrasound study of arm or leg veins with compression and maneuvers
venous-doppler-leg.mapping_note: CPT 93970: Duplex scan of extremity veins, complete bilateral.

x-ray-foot-ankle.hcpcs_desc: X-ray of ankle, minimum of 3 views
x-ray-foot-ankle.mapping_note: CPT 73610: Radiologic exam ankle, complete (3+ views).

x-ray-hand-wrist.hcpcs_desc: X-ray of hand, minimum of 3 views

x-ray-knee.hcpcs_desc: X-ray of knee, 4 or more views

x-ray-spine.hcpcs_desc: X-ray of lower and sacral spine, 2-3 views
x-ray-spine.mapping_note: CPT 72100: Radiologic exam spine, lumbosacral, 2-3 views.

adenoidectomy.hcpcs_desc: Removal of tonsils and adenoid glands (12 years or older)
adenoidectomy.mapping_note: CPT 42821: Tonsillectomy and adenoidectomy combined, age 12+. Pure adenoidectomy is rare in Medicare; CMS bundles it with tonsillectomy in this code.

arthroscopic-knee-surgery.hcpcs_desc: Removal of knee cartilage using an endoscope
arthroscopic-knee-surgery.mapping_note: CPT 29881: Knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy, medial OR lateral.

breast-biopsy.hcpcs_desc: Biopsy of breast and placement of locating device using ultrasound, first growth
breast-biopsy.mapping_note: CPT 19083: Breast biopsy with image guidance, percutaneous, including imaging supervision.

bronchoscopy.hcpcs_desc: Diagnostic exam of lung airway using an endoscope
bronchoscopy.mapping_note: CPT 31622: Bronchoscopy, diagnostic, with or without cell washing.

bunionectomy.hcpcs_desc: Correction of bunion with alignment correction of midfoot bone toward toe area
bunionectomy.mapping_note: CPT 28296: Correction hallux valgus, with sesamoidectomy when performed (Mitchell-type).

carpal-tunnel-release.hcpcs_desc: Release and/or relocation of hand nerve
carpal-tunnel-release.mapping_note: CPT 64721: Neuroplasty, median nerve at carpal tunnel (open release).

cataract-surgery-outpatient.hcpcs_desc: Removal of cataract with insertion of prosthetic lens
cataract-surgery-outpatient.mapping_note: CPT 66984: Extracapsular cataract removal with insertion of intraocular lens (IOL), without iridectomy.

chalazion-removal.hcpcs_desc: Removal of chronic growth of eyelid

colonoscopy.hcpcs_desc: Diagnostic exam of large bowel using a flexible endoscope
colonoscopy.mapping_note: CPT 45378: Colonoscopy diagnostic, flexible, including collection of specimen by brushing or washing.

cystoscopy.hcpcs_desc: Diagnostic exam of bladder and urethra using an endoscope

dialysis-access-surgery.hcpcs_desc: Relocation of major upper arm vein with connection to arm artery for hemodialysis
dialysis-access-surgery.mapping_note: CPT 36818: Arteriovenous anastomosis, open; by upper arm cephalic vein transposition.

endoscopic-sinus-surgery.hcpcs_desc: Incision of nasal sinus using an endoscope
endoscopic-sinus-surgery.mapping_note: CPT 31256: Nasal/sinus endoscopy with maxillary antrostomy.

epidural-steroid-injection.hcpcs_desc: Injection of substance into lower spine canal using imaging guidance
epidural-steroid-injection.mapping_note: CPT 62323: Lumbar/sacral epidural injection with imaging guidance.

ganglion-cyst-removal.hcpcs_desc: Removal of first cyst of wrist

hemorrhoid-surgery.mapping_note: CPT 46260: Hemorrhoidectomy, internal and external, 2+ columns.

ingrown-toenail-surgery.mapping_note: CPT 11750: Excision of nail and nail matrix, partial or complete (e.g. ingrown nail).

joint-injection-cortisone.hcpcs_desc: Aspiration and/or injection of fluid from large joint
joint-injection-cortisone.mapping_note: CPT 20610: Arthrocentesis/injection major joint (knee, shoulder, hip).

lithotripsy-kidney-stones.hcpcs_desc: Shock wave crushing of kidney stones

mole-removal.hcpcs_desc: Removal of noncancer skin growth of body, arms, or legs, 1.1-2.0 cm
mole-removal.mapping_note: CPT 11402: Excision benign lesion, trunk/arms/legs, 1.1-2.0 cm.

nasal-polyp-removal.hcpcs_desc: Biopsy or removal of nasal polyp or tissue using an endoscope
nasal-polyp-removal.mapping_note: CPT 31237: Nasal/sinus endoscopy with biopsy, polypectomy or debridement.

pilonidal-cyst-surgery.hcpcs_desc: Simple removal of cyst of tailbone

skin-lesion-removal.hcpcs_desc: Destruction of precancer skin growth, 1 growth
skin-lesion-removal.mapping_note: CPT 17000: Destruction of premalignant lesion (e.g. actinic keratosis), first lesion.

tonsillectomy.hcpcs_desc: Removal of tonsils (12 years or older)
tonsillectomy.mapping_note: CPT 42826: Tonsillectomy, primary or secondary, age 12 or over. Tonsillectomy is rare in Medicare-aged patients.

trigger-finger-release.hcpcs_desc: Incision of tendon covering of finger
trigger-finger-release.mapping_note: CPT 26055: Tendon sheath incision (e.g. trigger finger).

turp-prostate.hcpcs_desc: Removal of prostate gland using an electrocautery knife through urethra with control of bleeding using an endoscope
turp-prostate.mapping_note: CPT 52601: Transurethral electrosurgical resection of prostate (TURP).

tympanostomy-tubes.hcpcs_desc: Incision of eardrum with placement of eardrum tube under general anesthesia
tympanostomy-tubes.mapping_note: CPT 69436: Tympanostomy under general anesthesia. Tube placement is more common in pediatrics; volume in Medicare is modest.

upper-endoscopy-egd.hcpcs_desc: Biopsy of esophagus, stomach, and/or upper small bowel using a flexible endoscope
upper-endoscopy-egd.mapping_note: CPT 43239: Upper GI endoscopy (EGD) with biopsy.

varicose-vein-treatment.hcpcs_desc: Destruction of first incompetent vein of arm or leg using radiofrequency and imaging guidance
varicose-vein-treatment.mapping_note: CPT 36475: Endovenous ablation, radiofrequency, first vein.

wound-debridement.hcpcs_desc: Removal of skin and tissue, 20.0 sq cm or less
wound-debridement.mapping_note: CPT 11042: Debridement subcutaneous tissue, first 20 sq cm or less.

alcohol-misuse-screening.hcpcs_desc: Annual alcohol misuse screening, 5 to 15 minutes
alcohol-misuse-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0442: Annual alcohol misuse screening, 15 minutes (Medicare preventive).

allergy-testing.hcpcs_desc: Test for allergy using allergenic extract
allergy-testing.mapping_note: CPT 95004: Percutaneous skin tests (e.g. scratch), allergenic extracts.

annual-wellness-visit.hcpcs_desc: Annual wellness visit, includes a personalized prevention plan of service (pps), subsequent visit
annual-wellness-visit.mapping_note: HCPCS G0439: Annual Wellness Visit, subsequent (Medicare-specific). Higher volume than initial G0438.

bone-density-test-dexa-scan.hcpcs_desc: Dxa bone density measurement of hip, pelvis, spine
bone-density-test-dexa-scan.mapping_note: CPT 77080: DEXA bone density study, axial skeleton (same code as imaging dexa-bone-density-scan; CMS does not split clinical context).

cardiovascular-screening.mapping_note: CPT 80061: Lipid panel (cardiovascular disease screening, Medicare preventive every 5 years).

chiropractic-adjustment.mapping_note: CPT 98940: Chiropractic manipulative treatment, spinal, 1-2 regions (Medicare covers manual manipulation only).

chronic-care-management-monthly.hcpcs_desc: Chronic care management services, first 20 minutes of clinical staff time directed by health care professional, per calendar month
chronic-care-management-monthly.mapping_note: CPT 99490: Chronic care management, first 20 minutes per calendar month.

covid-19-vaccination.hcpcs_desc: Intramuscular administration of single severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (covid-19) vaccine, mrna-lnp, spike protein, preservative free, 30 mcg/0.3ml dosage, diluent reconstituted; first dose
covid-19-vaccination.mapping_note: CPT 0001A: Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine administration, first dose. Medicare pays separate admin fee.

depression-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0444: Annual depression screening, 15 minutes (Medicare preventive).

diabetes-screening.mapping_note: CPT 82947: Glucose, quantitative blood (diabetes screening, Medicare preventive).

diabetic-foot-exam.hcpcs_desc: Follow-up physician evaluation and management of a diabetic patient with diabetic sensory neuropathy resulting in a loss of protective sensation (lops) to include at least the following: (1) a patient history, (2) a physical examination that includes: (a)
diabetic-foot-exam.mapping_note: HCPCS G0246: Follow-up evaluation foot care, diabetic patient with peripheral neuropathy/LOPS.

ekg-electrocardiogram.hcpcs_desc: Routine electrocardiogram (ecg) using at least 12 leads with interpretation and report
ekg-electrocardiogram.mapping_note: CPT 93000: ECG complete, 12 leads with interpretation and report.

flu-vaccination.hcpcs_desc: Influenza vaccine, quadrivalent, preservative free, 0.5 ml dosage
flu-vaccination.mapping_note: CPT 90686: Influenza virus vaccine, quadrivalent, IM injection.

glaucoma-screening.hcpcs_desc: Glaucoma screening for high risk patients furnished by an optometrist or ophthalmologist
glaucoma-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0117: Glaucoma screening, high-risk, by ophthalmologist or optometrist.

hearing-test-audiometry.hcpcs_desc: Comprehensive hearing and speech recognition test
hearing-test-audiometry.mapping_note: CPT 92557: Comprehensive audiometry threshold + speech recognition.

hepatitis-b-screening.hcpcs_desc: Hepatitis b screening in non-pregnant, high risk individual includes hepatitis b surface antigen (hbsag), antibodies to hbsag (anti-hbs) and antibodies to hepatitis b core antigen (anti-hbc), and is followed by a neutralizing confirmatory test, when perfor
hepatitis-b-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0499: Hepatitis B screening, high risk individual.

hepatitis-c-screening.hcpcs_desc: Hepatitis c antibody screening, for individual at high risk and other covered indication(s)
hepatitis-c-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0472: Hepatitis C antibody screening, high risk.

hiv-screening.hcpcs_desc: Analysis for antibody to hiv-1 and hiv-2 virus
hiv-screening.mapping_note: CPT 86703: Antibody to HIV-1 and HIV-2, single result. Highest-volume Medicare HIV screening code.

mammogram-screening.mapping_note: CPT 77067: Screening mammography, bilateral (distinct from diagnostic 77066).

nutrition-counseling.hcpcs_desc: Medical nutrition therapy; reassessment and subsequent intervention(s) following second referral in same year for change in diagnosis, medical condition or treatment regimen (including additional hours needed for renal disease), individual, face to face wi
nutrition-counseling.mapping_note: HCPCS G0270: Medical nutrition therapy reassessment and intervention, individual, 15 minutes.

obesity-counseling.hcpcs_desc: Face-to-face behavioral counseling for obesity, 15 minutes
obesity-counseling.mapping_note: HCPCS G0447: Behavioral counseling for obesity, 15 minutes (Medicare preventive).

occupational-therapy-session.mapping_note: CPT 97530: Therapeutic activities, direct one-on-one, 15 minutes (OT).

office-visit-established-patient.hcpcs_desc: Established patient office or other outpatient visit, 20-29 minutes
office-visit-established-patient.mapping_note: CPT 99213: Office/outpatient visit, established patient, 20-29 minutes.

office-visit-new-patient.hcpcs_desc: New patient office or other outpatient visit, 30-44 minutes
office-visit-new-patient.mapping_note: CPT 99203: Office/outpatient visit, new patient, 30-44 minutes.

pap-smear.hcpcs_desc: Cervical or vaginal cancer screening; pelvic and clinical breast examination
pap-smear.mapping_note: HCPCS G0101: Cervical or vaginal cancer screening, pelvic + breast exam.

physical-therapy-session.hcpcs_desc: Therapy procedure using exercise to develop strength, endurance, range of motion, and flexibility, each 15 minutes

podiatry-visit.hcpcs_desc: Routine foot care by a physician of a diabetic patient with diabetic sensory neuropathy resulting in a loss of protective sensation (lops) to include, the local care of superficial wounds (i.e. superficial to muscle and fascia) and at least the following i
podiatry-visit.mapping_note: HCPCS G0247: Routine foot care, diabetic patient with peripheral neuropathy.

psa-test-prostate-screening.hcpcs_desc: Prostate cancer screening; prostate specific antigen test (psa)
psa-test-prostate-screening.mapping_note: HCPCS G0103: PSA screening, total (Medicare preventive).

psychiatry-visit.hcpcs_desc: Psychiatric diagnostic evaluation with medical services
psychiatry-visit.mapping_note: CPT 90792: Psychiatric diagnostic evaluation with medical services.

shingles-vaccination.mapping_note: CPT 90750: Zoster (shingles) recombinant vaccine (Shingrix). Note: shingles vaccine is covered under Medicare Part D (pharmacy benefit), not Part B PFS — Part B fee schedule data is therefore not representative. Patients pay $0 cost-share under the Inflation Reduction Act (2023+).

skin-cancer-screening.hcpcs_desc: Established patient office or other outpatient visit, 20-29 minutes
skin-cancer-screening.mapping_note: CPT 99213: Established office visit (Medicare does not have a dedicated skin-cancer-screening HCPCS; full-body skin exam billed under standard E/M unless a finding triggers a separate procedure code).

sleep-study-consultation.hcpcs_desc: Sleep study in sleep lab (6 years or older)
sleep-study-consultation.mapping_note: CPT 95810: Polysomnography, sleep staging with 4+ parameters.

speech-therapy-session.hcpcs_desc: Treatment of speech, language, voice, communication, and/or hearing processing disorder
speech-therapy-session.mapping_note: CPT 92507: Treatment of speech, language, voice, individual.

spirometry-lung-function.hcpcs_desc: Test to measure expiratory airflow and volume
spirometry-lung-function.mapping_note: CPT 94010: Spirometry including graphic record, total/timed vital capacity.

telehealth-visit.hcpcs_desc: Established patient office or other outpatient visit, 20-29 minutes
telehealth-visit.mapping_note: CPT 99213: Standard E/M code reported with modifier 95 / POS 02 for telehealth. CMS does not have a separate primary code for video visits as of FY 2024.

tobacco-cessation-counseling.hcpcs_desc: Smoking and tobacco use intensive counseling, 4-10 minutes
tobacco-cessation-counseling.mapping_note: CPT 99406: Smoking and tobacco use cessation counseling visit, intermediate (3-10 minutes).

vision-exam-diabetic.hcpcs_desc: Established patient complete exam of visual system
vision-exam-diabetic.mapping_note: CPT 92014: Ophthalmological services, established patient, comprehensive.

wound-care-visit.hcpcs_desc: Removal of tissue from wound, 20.0 sq cm or less
wound-care-visit.mapping_note: CPT 97597: Debridement, open wound, ≤20 sq cm (active wound care).
